title: 复利修仙
author: Apex Shaw
intro: 资质最差的四灵根苟王，靠复利思维和极度谨慎在修仙世界稳步崛起。九成九天才死于自身错误，唯有主角永不踩坑。每个人都不蠢，但修行路上全是认知误区和冲动陷阱——这就是全书最大逻辑支点

title: 互联网修仙传
intro: 996码农加班猝死穿越成杂灵根散修，修炼二十年还在炼气三层。但他发现天道的灵气运转路径……太像算法了。大数据杀熟、新用户礼包、A/B测试——修仙世界的底层逻辑，居然全是他前世写烂的代码。既然天道是代码，那就能逆向工程。

title: 代码纪元
author: AI
intro: 认知锁解除了，但天空还是灰的。三百年的工业遮蔽不是自然现象——是谁遮住了星星？0x7F3C的信号引来了不止一个回应，而穿越者的原主人意识正在某个地方等待被找到。

title: 我是一个外卖骑士
intro: 外卖小哥暴雨天送餐被雷劈，醒来发现电动车"银电"能光速骑行。从此抢在分手前送到和解奶茶、3秒送到奶粉、在每个人最需要的瞬间刚好出现——光速开挂处处打脸。但银电的纹路在衰减，每次骑行都在倒计时。速度能解决距离，解决不了离别。

title: 末世赘婿
author: Hermes Agent
intro: 人类最后一位战神在地球沦陷之际被救世系统送回末日爆发前3年，重生为第一豪门的赘婿。他必须保住这段婚姻——因为离婚意味着因果后门失效，末日倒计时将从1095天缩短至3秒。而开启末日传送门的叛徒，正是这个豪门本身。

title: The Daylight Tyrant
author: Apex Shaw
category: Dark Fantasy / Dark Academia / Female Lead / Magic
intro: Kael Ashworth was forcibly turned and abandoned—fledgling vampire, no sire, no coven, no chance. Then he made a Blood Pact with a dying paladin and gained something that shouldn't exist: full immunity to sunlight. Now the night's most hunted prey is about to become its most dangerous predator.

title: Hearing the Wolf King's Heart, I Became the Wolf Queen
author: Apex Shaw
category: Romance Fantasy / Werewolf / Female Lead / Sweet Pet
intro: Seraphina, a wolf-less girl at the bottom of the Ironmoon Pack's hierarchy, is dragged before the cold, terrifying Wolf King for judgment. But when a Moon Goddess's mischief grants her a one-way mind-

title: War God Reborn
intro: The War God died watching the sky burn. He reopened his eyes to divorce papers at a banquet—reborn as the despised husband of Liang Xue. He must keep this marriage alive, because divorce collapses the Salvation System's backdoor into her family's arrays, and the apocalypse countdown drops from 1095 days to three seconds. The family that wants him gone? They're the ones building the portal to end the world.

title: Apocalypse Romance System
author: Apex Shaw
intro: When the zombie apocalypse turns 99% of humanity into walking corpses, Marcus Chen—a  shut-in gamer playing MMOs in his apartment—is the last person you'd expect to survive.  But when a mysterious Rom

title: Lying Flat in the Asylum
author: Apex Shaw
intro: Chloe's mother had her handcuffed and committed to the Serenity Institute—a luxury wellness retreat with a 94% success rate and a creepy interest in compliance. But Chloe has a psychology degree, a weaponized meme account, and zero respect for institutions that call rebellion a disease.

title: The Eldritch Heiress's Bottomless Black Card
author: Apex Shaw
category: Contemporary / Dark Academia / urban-fantasy / monster-romance / dark-comedy
intro: When the Nether-Grid descends and modern currency collapses into ash, Roxanne Vance — a fashion-obsessed art student with crippling credit card debt — discovers she's the sole heir to the Primordial V

title: The Muted
category: Cyber-thriller / Dystopia / Female Lead / Romance / Sci-Fi
intro: A socially anxious illustrator takes an anti-anxiety drug that makes her literally invisible to algorithms and human perception. As she spirals from godlike freedom into absolute isolation, she's save

title: No Thoughts, Just Fluff
author: Apex Shaw
category: Contemporary / Female Lead / Romance / cozy fantasy comedy
intro: A burned-out 25-year-old PR worker in Brooklyn transforms into a giant, eternally relaxed capybara-like creature — and discovers that the best thing she can do for herself is absolutely nothing.

title: delulu-is-the-solulu
author: Apex Shaw
intro: After 36 sleepless hours writing ad copy for a protein powder that tastes like chalk, Chloe Miller snapped—but not the way you'd expect. She didn't cry or quit. She simply decided she was a fallen queen from a magical realm, and the corporate world was beneath her. The delulu isn't just real—it's her superpower.

title: Algorithm-A
author: Apex Shaw
intro: At 3:47 a.m., a scarlet A appeared on Hester's door. Not a letter—a verdict, broadcast by an algorithm that decides who belongs and who disappears. She's a scientist who built models that would never bear her name. Now she's the name the system wants to erase.

title: Of Rust and Roses
author: Apex Shaw
category: Cyberpunk / Dystopia / Female Lead / Sci-Fi Romance / Sapphic Political Thriller
intro: A 21st-century climate physicist is thrusted into a post-apocalyptic world split between a 'perfect' solar-powered Eden on the surface and a cyberpunk hellscape underground, where she must ally with t

title: The Turn of the Screen
author: Apex Shaw
category: Dark Academia / Female Lead / psychological horror / thriller
intro: A deeply unreliable psychology grad takes a £200K job at a Scottish Highlands manor to care for influencer twins—but the internet audience following her Reddit cries for help discovers she may be the

title: The Fluidity of Us
author: Apex Shaw
intro: An immortal gender-fluid designer and a fashion empire heir are bound by centuries of reincarnated love — but every time their passion peaks, her body shifts, and he must decide if he can love whoever

title: Behind the Words
author: Apex Shaw
intro: A brilliant but self-loathing goth girl ghostwrites love letters for her gorgeous influencer best friend to win over a sapiosexual literature professor — and falls for him himself through the words.

title: Glitching Through Fate
author: Apex Shaw
intro: 22-year-old Ivy League grad Avery, paralyzed by FOMO and choice anxiety, discovers a mysterious app called Fork that lets her shift consciousness between three parallel lives—but every version of the

title: Phantom of the Deep Web
author: Apex Shaw
intro: A struggling singer drowning in poverty is discovered by an invisible phantom — a reclusive genius who controls the internet from his underground labyrinth. He'll make her a star. The price: everythin

title: Unraveled: The Ghost in the Atelier
author: Apex Shaw
category: Female Lead / fashion thriller / dark romance / mystery
intro: A viral vintage critic is hired by a luxury fashion house's charismatic CEO, only to discover the brand's genius designs were stolen from a woman imprisoned in its basement — and now she must choose b

title: Unfollowed: The Silicon Valley Vampire Liquidation Guide
author: Apex Shaw
intro: When wellness influencer Lucy Chen vanishes after a secretive tech summit, her best friend Maya — a audio engineer with supernatural hearing — discovers something inhuman in Lucy's last recording. Tog

title: Ashes of Us
author: Apex Shaw
intro: Two victims of the same abusive system — a controlled heiress and a discarded foster boy — forge a dark pact to burn down the old-money academy that made them, only to be torn apart by betrayal and re

title: Burn Book 2.0: Inferno.exe
author: Apex Shaw
category: Cyber Thriller / Female Lead / Dystopia / Sci-Fi / Revenge / YA
intro: A fashion-influencer-by-day, elite-hacker-by-night Gen Z woman activates a dark-web AI called Inferno to systematically destroy the worst people on the internet — cyberbullies, crypto scammers, toxic
